name: DIVERGING BAR

meta.form: horizontal diverging bar from a zero axis
meta.data_required: one categorical dimension + one signed measure (variance vs plan, budget, or zero)

see_instead.when: deltas chain into a running total

use_when: signed variance per category: ahead/behind, over/under, surplus/deficit
the zero line is a meaningful reference (plan, budget, target)
not_when: sequential deltas that bridge two totals (use CH-FLO-01)
all values one sign (use CH-RNK-01; a one-sided diverging bar is a plain bar)
two-point before/after per category (CH-DEV-02 when built)

data_shape.title: string, action title naming the worst or best deviation with a number
data_shape.eyebrow: string caps, rendered only when the DL chrome asks for it
data_shape.unit: string, appears once, on the first value label

scale.note: symmetric: both sides scale to max absolute value; zero line center

rules: zero line vertical at plot center; positives grow right, negatives left
rows sorted descending by value (best on top, worst at bottom)
positive role for favorable, negative role for unfavorable; ALWAYS with signed labels
value labels outside the bar end, signed
unit once, on the first value label
anti_patterns: color without signed labels (color-blind readers lose the sign)
asymmetric scales that exaggerate one side
qa: zero line at center, both sides same scale
title names the extreme deviation with a number
